privileged_info_summary: Thomas Bergmann is a 65-year-old male patient (DOB: January 19, 1960) from Kitchener, Ontario. He is Patient 13 in the OSCAR EMR synthetic database. The task requires creating an encounter note documenting exertional chest pain with ECG showing ST changes and cardiology referral, plus a tickler reminder with keywords about cardiology referral follow-up (contact patient if no appointment within 2 weeks). OSCAR login credentials are username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', PIN '1117', accessed via http://localhost:8080/oscar/login.jsp. All patient data and credentials are part of the synthetic demo environment.
